mapper.insert: insert into question ( id, f_code, q_idx, q_status, q_title, q_content, q_answer, q_answerDate, q_secret, q_createdDate ) values ( #{id}, #{f_code}, null, #{q_status}, #{q_title}, #{q_content}, null, null, #{q_secret}, sysdate )
mapper.select: select id, f_code, q_idx, q_status, q_title, q_content, q_answer, q_answerDate, q_secret, q_createdDate from question where q_idx = #{q_idx}
mapper.update: update question set q_answer = #{q_answer}, q_answerDate = sysdate, q_status = 'done' where q_idx = #{q_idx}
update question set q_title = #{q_title}, q_content = #{q_content}, q_secret = #{q_secret}, where q_idx = #{q_idx}
